lines: Main apni favorite hoon!
Jo main bolti hoon woh main karti hoon.
Mujhe khud pe poora trust hai.
Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main kya karun.
Sab kuch itna complicated kyun hai?
Main thak gayi hoon.
What if I choose wrong?
What if I regret it later?
How do I know what’s right?
Maybe I’m the problem.
Or maybe I just don’t understand myself yet.
I need time.
Yeh pyaar itna mushkil kyun hai?
Dil maanta hi nahi.
Main kya karun?
Aapne kabhi samjha hi nahi mujhe.
Main sirf sach keh rahi hoon.
Aur sach dard deta hai.
Ishq mein sirf jeet hoti hai.
Ya toh paana… ya phir mar jaana.
Beech ka kuch nahi hota.
Hum woh nahi jo darr ke peeche hat jaaye.
Hum ladte hain… aur jeette hain.
Yahi humari pehchaan hai.
Tum na bilkul stupid ho.
Par thode cute bhi ho.
Aur annoying toh bahut ho.
Why do you care so much?
What are you really afraid of?
Answer honestly.
